cms.task_text: Bloky hřebene (4 zuby, výška 30) jsou [hlp]rozhozeny[/hlp]. Sestavte správně.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="220" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block><block type="turtle_backward" x="20" y="160"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" x="220" y="160"></block><block type="turtle_right" x="20" y="280"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="220" y="280"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field></block><block type="turtle_left" x="20" y="400"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="220" y="400"></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
